description: Per-campaign email credentials, alert history Sentry integration, and backup & recovery redesign. Extends workspace email config to support campaign-level overrides (Gmail for one campaign, SMTP for another), adds live Sentry error feed to the alert history tab, and redesigns the disaster recovery tab into a three-section Backups & Recovery panel with database info, infra snapshots, and per-workspace/per-campaign data export.

userStories.title: Per-campaign email config DB migration
userStories.description: Add optional campaign_id column to genesis.email_provider_config table. Replace the UNIQUE(workspace_id) constraint with a composite unique index on (workspace_id, COALESCE(campaign_id, sentinel_uuid)) so each workspace can have one default plus per-campaign overrides. Add campaign_id index for fast lookups.
acceptanceCriteria: supabase/migrations/20260305_002_per_campaign_email_config.sql exists and applies cleanly
campaign_id column is nullable UUID with FK to campaigns(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
Old UNIQUE(workspace_id) is dropped
New composite unique index uq_email_provider_workspace_campaign exists
RLS policy email_provider_workspace_isolation enforces workspace_id isolation
Existing rows (campaign_id IS NULL) remain as workspace defaults

userStories.title: Per-campaign email config API route
userStories.description: Create app/api/workspace/email-config/campaign/route.ts with GET (returns campaign-specific config falling back to workspace default), POST (upserts campaign override), DELETE (removes campaign override to revert to default). Auth via Clerk, validates campaign belongs to workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/workspace/email-config/campaign?workspace_id=X&campaign_id=Y returns { source: 'campaign'|'workspace_default'|'none', config }
POST with { workspace_id, campaign_id, provider, ...fields } upserts a campaign-specific row
DELETE removes the campaign override row
Encrypted columns are never returned (replaced with '[ENCRYPTED]')
Campaign ownership validated: campaign.workspace_id must match workspace_id
Proper 400/401/404 error responses

userStories.title: Campaign email config UI selector
userStories.description: Add UI in campaign settings to override the workspace-default email provider. Show current source (workspace default vs campaign override), allow selecting provider and configuring credentials, with 'Reset to workspace default' action that calls DELETE.
acceptanceCriteria: Campaign settings page shows current email provider source
User can select Gmail or SMTP as campaign override
SMTP form collects host/port/username/password/from fields
Gmail shows 'Connect Gmail' OAuth button
'Reset to default' button removes campaign override
Success/error toasts on save
userStories.notes: API route exists but no UI component built yet. Create components/campaigns/campaign-email-config.tsx.

userStories.title: Alert History tab redesign with Sentry integration
userStories.description: Rewrite components/admin/alert-history-tab.tsx with three sections: Platform Alerts (from Scale Health), Application Errors (from Sentry API), and a rich empty state guide explaining all 6 alert categories. Add status filter pills, quick stats row, and expandable Sentry issue rows with stack info.
acceptanceCriteria: Platform Alerts section shows scale health alerts with severity badges, ack/resolve buttons
Sentry section fetches from /api/admin/sentry-issues and shows issues with expandable details
Status filter pills: All, Active, Ack'd, Resolved, Ignored with counts
Quick stats row: Active, Acknowledged, Resolved, Sentry counts
Empty state shows 6 category cards explaining what alerts to expect
Sentry not-configured notice with env var setup instructions
SWR polling: Sentry at 60s interval
userStories.notes: Alert history tab fully redesigned at components/admin/alert-history-tab.tsx

userStories.title: Sentry issues proxy API route
userStories.description: Create app/api/admin/sentry-issues/route.ts that proxies Sentry's project issues API. Super admin only. Returns simplified issue objects with id, title, culprit, level, count, first/last seen, permalink. Gracefully handles missing Sentry config.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/admin/sentry-issues returns { configured, issues[], nextCursor? }
If SENTRY_ORG/PROJECT/AUTH_TOKEN missing: returns configured=false with message
Issues mapped to simplified shape with count, level, permalink
Supports cursor pagination and query filter params
30s cache via next revalidate
Super admin auth enforced

userStories.title: Backups & Recovery tab redesign
userStories.description: Replace the old DisasterRecoveryTab with a new BackupsRecoveryTab in components/admin/backups-recovery-tab.tsx. Three sections: Database Backups (Supabase info + what's covered + how to restore), Infrastructure Snapshots (regional health, snapshot table, create/delete/restore, emergency failover), and Data Export (per workspace/campaign JSON export with download).
acceptanceCriteria: Database section explains Supabase auto-backups, shows 8 covered data types, restore instructions
Infrastructure section shows regional health pills, snapshot table, create/delete/restore actions
Emergency failover is collapsible (hidden by default) with critical warning
Data Export section has workspace + optional campaign_id inputs
Export result shows row counts per table with download/copy buttons
Summary stats row: coverage %, total snapshots, size, monthly cost
Empty state shows 3-card guide explaining each backup layer
Tab renamed to 'Backups & Recovery' in admin sidebar
userStories.notes: New component at components/admin/backups-recovery-tab.tsx. Admin page wired up.

userStories.title: Backup data export API route
userStories.description: Create app/api/admin/backup-export/route.ts with POST endpoint that exports workspace data as JSON. Supports optional campaign_id scoping. Exports contacts, campaigns, email_events, sequences with 10k row limit per table. Super admin only.
acceptanceCriteria: POST with { workspace_id, campaign_id?, tables? } returns exported data
Tables allowlisted to ['contacts', 'campaigns', 'email_events', 'sequences']
Campaign scoping filters by campaign_id where applicable
10k row limit with truncated flag in metadata
Response includes per-table counts and exported_at timestamp
Super admin auth enforced

userStories.title: Workspace deployer campaign-aware config lookup
userStories.description: Update sidecar/workflow-deployer.ts to check for campaign-specific email_provider_config before falling back to workspace default when deploying campaign workflows. This enables per-campaign Gmail vs SMTP template selection.
acceptanceCriteria: workflow-deployer queries email_provider_config with campaign_id first
Falls back to workspace default (campaign_id IS NULL) if no campaign override
Correct template set selected (Gmail vs SMTP) based on resolved provider
Credential injection uses the correct provider's credentials
userStories.notes: Not yet implemented. The deployer still queries only by workspace_id.
